preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.0.5: Claude sign-in fix — no more copy/paste required, no more silent failures.
whatsNew: Removed BROWSER=none bug that forced users onto the copy/paste fallback page
Claude Code CLI's built-in localhost callback now works — sign in via browser, done
Real feedback in the paste dialog when the CLI subprocess exits early (used to silently do nothing)
